problems.text: How many cats are hidden behind the fence?
What goes in place of the question mark?

Amelia, Juliana, and Mira each write a different number on a paper. Amelia writes the smallest one-digit number possible that is greater than zero, Juliana writes the biggest one-digit number possible, and Mira writes the sum of those two numbers. What number did Mira write?
